title: cenchrus pilosus
intro: Cenchrus pilosus, also known as the cluster bean or pearl millet, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus pilosus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, powder, or oil, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
